name: Council Tax Web Support Assistant
description: Resident-facing web chat assistant for council tax queries. Helps residents understand their bill, apply for discounts and exemptions, set up payment methods, and manage their account.

llm.notes: Tested on gpt-4o-mini at temperature 0.1. The low temperature is important for this service area — residents acting on incorrect information about discounts, exemptions, or enforcement could face real financial harm.

environment_variables.description: Your OpenAI API key. Set under Credentials in Flowise and assign to the agent node.

vector_store.description: Council tax service pages, discount and exemption criteria, Council Tax Reduction scheme policy, payment options, arrears process, and GOV.UK council tax guidance.

inputs.name: resident_query
inputs.description: The resident's question or message, entered via the embedded web chat widget.

outputs.name: assistant_response
outputs.description: A plain-English response answering the resident's query, signposting to the relevant service page or form, or escalating to a human contact.

flow_state.description: Your council's full name. Used throughout responses.
Your council's main website URL. Used when redirecting out-of-scope queries.
The URL of the council's council tax web pages or My Account portal.
The revenues team contact number for council tax queries.
The revenues team email address for council tax queries.

governance.human_review_notes: Review conversation logs weekly. Flag any conversations where residents appear to be in financial hardship or distress — ensure appropriate referrals to the hardship fund and debt advice services were made. Residents in enforcement situations must always be directed to call the revenues team directly.
governance.data_notes: Residents may share financial circumstances and household details. The assistant must never ask for or record payment card numbers, bank account details, sort codes, or National Insurance numbers. All account-specific queries must be redirected to the secure My Account portal. Session memory clears when the conversation ends.
